item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-12
item.description: Fixed critical summarize deployment bugs blocking 72 days of reports, verified workflow installation

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-11
item.description: Designed and deployed unified AI agent workflow system to three repositories (gadget, TokenMonitor, LifeCopilot), and completed Miniconda migration from C: to D: drive freeing 70 GB of space

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-10
item.description: Prepared conda environment migration from C: to D: drive by exporting all environments and downloading installer

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-07
item.description: Prepared ErrorRecoveryBench for NeurIPS 2026 double-blind submission: generated Croissant metadata, downloaded 30GB dataset, fixed major data errors in paper tables (BC-RNN Normal SR 21%→56%), and created publication-quality figures.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-06
item.description: Prepared RecoverBench robotic manipulation benchmark for NeurIPS 2026 submission through code anonymization, Chinese-to-English translation, paper bibliography refactoring, and data consolidation, while releasing TokenMonitor v0.13.1 with FloatBall rate limit visibility fixes

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-05
item.description: Diagnosed and fixed RTX 5090 PCIe crash, developed gadget toolkit documentation, resolved multiple TypeScript/Rust bugs in TokenMonitor, and released v0.13.0 with upstream conflict resolution

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-04
item.description: Comprehensive TokenMonitor development cycle: analyzed upstream changes, performed hybrid merge resolving 20 conflicts, integrated official Cursor branding, refactored Settings UI for multi-provider support, fixed critical Windows Codex bug and data consistency issues, automated Tauri version sync, and restored merge-reverted features

item.title: Weekly Summary 2026-W18
item.description: Successfully stabilized and released TokenMonitor v0.12.1, resolving 6+ critical Windows platform bugs including hover oscillation feedback loops, tray icon focus issues, window positioning instability, and false positive warnings. Implemented automated Cursor IDE reconnection with token refresh polling, eliminating manual restart requirements. Established robust CI/CD pipeline with comprehensive formatting and linting compliance across multi-platform builds.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-03
item.description: Minimal productivity day: one simple documentation task completed on Windows desktop; multiple failed login attempts on MacBook prevented any work there.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-02
item.description: Analyzed robotics model performance regressions and fixed TokenMonitor Cursor utilization display bug

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-05-01
item.description: Please deploy 66 daily reports from the mini-tool project to GitHub Pages in bulk.

item.title: Monthly Summary 2026-04
item.description: 通过系统性的调试、基于审计的清理工作流程、对抗性评审以防止关键错误的发生，以及在每个数据管道边界处实施防御性去重操作，从而展现了工程实践的成熟性。在跨项目模式中，出现了一些特定的模式：首先，是通过运行时的实证证据来替代代码分析，以便进行根本原因的识别；其次，是采用了“替换补丁”的架构决策；最后，是在每个数据管道边界处实施防御性去重操作。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-30
item.description: Updated TokenMonitor project from v0.12.2 to v0.12.3, synchronizing local main branch with latest tag

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-29
item.description: Implemented comprehensive UI improvements for TokenMonitor (model name formatting, brand color palette, chart legend sorting), fixed macOS CI warnings, and completed error recovery training data collection with server upload

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-28
item.description: Released TokenMonitor v0.12.1 with window resize fix, UI polish, and CI compliance improvements

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-27
item.description: Fixed 6+ Windows-specific TokenMonitor bugs (tray focus, PowerShell popups, window anchor detection, hover oscillation, warning thresholds, bottom edge alignment) and implemented one-click Cursor IDE auto-reconnect with token refresh polling

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-26
item.description: Fixed Tauri development environment on Linux and attempted to sync feature branch with upstream v0.11.1, encountering 29 merge conflicts

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-25
item.description: Fixed TokenMonitor development environment and generated comprehensive token usage statistics with cache analysis for Apr 13-19

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-24
item.description: Integrated Apple Speech as default ASR in MeetingHelper, completed comprehensive TokenMonitor refactoring (codebase cleanup, dynamic exchange rates, CI optimization), fixed critical 25x data inflation bugs in JSONL/SSH deduplication, enhanced SSH sync with auto-discovery, and documented MimicGen augmentation pipeline for error recovery benchmark

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-23
item.description: Completed Idea Pipeline Phase 2 integration: migrated to local cross-platform Whisper, implemented Discord command interface, and added passive idea clustering

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-22
item.description: Performed comprehensive LifeCopilot repository audit resolving 20 findings, then designed and implemented full Idea Pipeline feature with voice capture, interactive AI refinement, and multi-format expression generation

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-21
item.description: Configured dual-boot GRUB bootloader to prioritize Windows and resolved menu navigation issues across Linux and Windows environments

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-20
item.description: Debugged and fixed multiple issues in the gadget website build pipeline: image sync, frontmatter language validation, translation prompt optimization, and chart styling

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-19
item.description: Set up website build environment on Linux, debugged translation pipeline failures, and fixed cross-platform compatibility issues

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-18
item.description: Encountered persistent authentication issues preventing any work throughout the day

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-17
item.description: Created task-switching checkpoint skill, enhanced MeetingHelper with multi-language ASR, Metal GPU acceleration, and real-time noise suppression, then conducted comprehensive website code review fixing 11 bugs including critical CSS layout issue

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-16
item.description: Refactored error recovery demo collection system with simplified validation codebase and relaxed quota rules, and installed agent-skills plugin globally for Claude Code

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-15
item.description: Systematically debugged and resolved ErrorRecovery robotics project environment setup, fixing 5 critical bugs blocking Coffee task execution, then established full reproducibility by tracking modified dependencies and creating automated patch system for cluster deployment

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-14
item.description: Completed 5 MIHD core modules (HD dataset support, label mixing analysis, ARI stability testing, patch size experiments, neighborhood query integration), uploaded 18GB checkpoint to athena server, resolved TokenMonitor git conflict, implemented error recovery benchmark analysis pipeline and data collection workflow, generated 6 task success videos, configured independent Claude Code environment on tianhe server, and fixed gadget rclone configuration

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-13
item.description: Completed major milestones across four projects: MIHD NeurIPS paper draft and multimodal fusion diagnosis, MeetingHelper dual-audio transcription upgrade, error-recovery benchmark architecture and NeurIPS outline, BOSS LeRobot pipeline bug fixes, and battery foundation model research

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-12
item.description: Advanced research pipeline development across two projects: MIHD spatial transcriptomics benchmark planning and error recovery documentation/troubleshooting

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-11
item.description: 在四台设备上进行的高强度技术工作：完成了BetterSSH全栈项目的从零到生产的开发过程，优化了多项目开发工具链，对MimicGen扩展系统进行了深度重构，构建了适用于NeurIPS学术写作的框架，并扩展了语音识别后端功能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-10
item.description: Multi-project development day: completed MIHD benchmark paper blueprint, fixed MeetingHelper Screenpipe compatibility, debugged LIBERO/battery training pipelines, implemented OpenClaw features with zero technical debt, and enhanced TokenMonitor pricing accuracy to match Claude Code

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-09
item.description: Cross-device full-stack development day: optimized robot learning pipelines on tianhe (MimicGen analysis + human collection workflow + multi-dataset contrastive learning), resolved infrastructure issues (Node proxy, Claude Code permissions), executed major gadget refactoring (Chinese→English output with Ollama translation), completed two large architecture upgrades (LifeCopilot OpenClaw integration with 70 tests, meeting-helper from scratch via Screenpipe+MCP), and enhanced TokenMonitor with timezone-aware SSH handling plus UI animation fixes

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-08
item.description: Completed cross-platform code optimization and translation automation across HPC/robotics projects, debugged three ML data pipelines, migrated translation infrastructure to local Ollama, and rewrote robotics augmentation system from action replay to target-pose execution

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-07
item.description: 已修复 website/update.sh 脚本中的4个错误问题，并完成了完整的Hugo部署环境的搭建。现在，网站更新流程已经能够从完全失败的状态恢复过来，目前所有7个步骤都已完成。同时，每日/每周报告的数据同步流程也已经启动。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-06
item.description: 已完成MIHD论文草稿的第三条编辑注释计划的实施，包括重新撰写Introduction部分P1段、扩展Abstract内容以及修改R5/R6段。同时进行了三组新的跨切片查询实验，并修复了HD Niche Query可视化部分的错误。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-05
item.description: 我们已经完成了Linux FloatBall fixed window + GDK Input Shape架构的重构工作，这一重构旨在彻底解决平台级别的几何偏移问题。同时，我们也系统地解决了Life-Copilot Discord Bot中存在的结构化日志缺失以及MCP工具遭遇权限拒绝这两大问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-04
item.description: 我们已经对TokenMonitor FloatBall在Linux系统中的多个系统级bug进行了深入调试和修复，包括GTK尺寸协商问题以及WM clamp定位偏移等问题。同时，我们还完成了NeurIPS 2025 D&B Track 63篇论文的系统性研究，并且实现了Life-Copilot的多个重要功能，比如彻底重构了Discord Bot的架构，删除了2823行代码；完全实现了Screen Time Tracker功能；提升了飞书Bot的创意捕获效率；以及实现了与Codex/Anthropic后端的连接。此外，我们还探讨了AionUI远程SSH接入的可行性。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-03
item.description: The MIHD project has completed additional experiments on HD fusion, organized the narrative threads of the paper, and started writing the bilingual skeleton. We have established a distinct research focus on zero-shot FM embedding fusion. TokenMonitor has been updated to fix an error in Rust compilation, and the bug fixing for the Linux GTK window positioning issue continues. Gadget has completed two rounds of rclone bidirectional synchronization and investigated the destination of NIPS research data.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-02
item.description: Dual-device collaboration: DCC is responsible for building the experimental framework for the MIHD paper (using GPU Slurm scripts and three visualization scripts). DesktopLinux ensures that TokenMonitor addresses any platform-related bugs in Linux/Wayland, and also resolves the 21 code review issues mentioned in PR #4. These issues have been pushed to GitHub. Additionally, efforts are being made to initialize the new machine’s environment and configure the Claude code development tools.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-04-01
item.description: DCC端完成了Leiden全量对比实验（核心结论是：高质量的嵌入向量优于聚类方法的选择），并创建了HD niche query可视化界面；DesktopLinux端则完成了新的Linux工作站系统的初始化设置，以及TokenMonitor Tauri的构建工作。此外，通过两轮迭代改进，解决了悬浮按钮在Linux系统上位置不稳定的问题，以及收起效果在不同平台上的兼容性问题。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-31
item.description: 我们已经完成了本周的工作计划，包括Leiden聚类集成以及STHD Ground Truth的集成。此外，我们还成功运行了DLPFC Leiden baseline和HD全流程评估，并获得了重要的实验数据。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-30
item.description: 已完成TEDDY-G 400M基因基础模型在DLPFC全部11个切片上的嵌入提取及多策略融合测试，并撰写了W13周报，总结了上周的实验成果。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-29
item.description: 分析了TEDDY单细胞基础模型论文中涉及的内容，修复了现有提取脚本中的4个重要错误，并成功完成了DLPFC数据集的嵌入提取部署工作。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-28
item.description: Enhanced cchypothesis debugging skill with intelligent dual-track investigation + fixed TokenMonitor dashboard jitter and window positioning issues

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-27
item.description: Created hypothesis-driven debugging skill (cchypothesis) and used it to solve complex TokenMonitor UI flickering issue

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-26
item.description: Systematically enhanced ccplan skill with 5 major iterations (prompt calibration, multi-intent decomposition, Feature Guard Protocol), completed comprehensive TokenMonitor refactoring (file splitting, type safety, caching optimization), implemented and iteratively refined float ball UI across 8+ sessions, migrated cost calculation to ccusage CLI, and documented architecture for contributors.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-25
item.description: Completed three architectural improvements for gadget project (research module refactoring 2934→7 modules, skills ecosystem optimization 50→28 global, optimize skill 1→4 languages) and TokenMonitor cross-platform adaptation (macOS-only → Windows/Linux/macOS with bug fixes and 1300+ line code cleanup)

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-24
item.description: Refactored gadget summarize module into 8 components with 72 tests, designed 3 Claude Code skills using paper-style documentation methodology, and executed comprehensive cross-platform migration planning for TokenMonitor with initial implementation removing 350+ lines of macOS-only code

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-23
item.description: DCC HPC 集群已完成环境初始化（使用 rclone 进行数据同步、调查 GPU 节点、安装相关软件），同时已经梳理了 MIHD 研究项目中存在的问题，并将这些信息记录在了文档中。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-22
item.description: Completed batch generation of W05-W12 historical weekly reports, fixed critical website deployment bugs (PaperMod theme update, update.sh robustness), and refactored gadget’s Hugo deployment architecture with unified outputs/site staging area, bugJournal dropdown navigation, and integrated benchmark report publishing

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-21
item.description: Configured development environment, fixed critical bugs in summarization pipeline, integrated Codex support, and upgraded all AI agents to Opus 4.6

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-20
item.description: On MacBook with gadget project: batch-generated 2026-03-19 daily reports, comprehensively updated and verified all documentation against codebase (fixed 7 discrepancies), discovered and fixed rclone sync-all bug (missing reports download causing repeated LLM calls), and executed complete git history cleanup removing 452 personal files (94MB) with rclone sync infrastructure establishment (repo size reduced from 22MB to 516KB)

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-19
item.description: Conducted cross-device multi-project research and development: spatial transcriptomics Harmony alignment experiments revealing semantic-batch mixing trade-offs, robotic error recovery pipeline from training optimization through portable deployment (139 passing tests), CalendarPro/Life Copilot complete architectural refactoring eliminating single-intent bottleneck with multi-intent classifier, and comprehensive knowledge management infrastructure expansion including gadget research tool 5-mode system upgrade with chunked long-text analysis, Yuke Zhu complete academic trajectory profiling (2012-2026, 100+ papers across 10+ analysis iterations), and batch consolidation of 30+ days historical daily reports from Feb-Mar 2026

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-18
item.description: Added batch update intent to CalendarPro for handling multi-task status reports, with full test coverage and documentation updates

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-17
item.description: Cross-device collaboration on MIHD spatial omics refactoring, QCVLA latent bridge deep dive with FLARE-inspired improvements, VLA training/inference infrastructure fixes, error benchmark data generation, and system tool enhancements

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-16
item.description: Completed cross-section embedding diagnostic proving Foundation Models essential for spatial transcriptomics; designed and implemented error recovery pipeline (81% data reduction); fixed critical robosuite coordinate bug; launched large-scale scene generation; conducted systematic academic profiler development with 30+ researcher analyses

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-15
item.description: Completed comprehensive CalendarPro optimization with 7-phase parallel implementation (230 tests passed), unified gadget research toolkit integrating paper discovery/profiler/citations into single CLI, extracted shared utilities into common/ package eliminating 400+ lines of duplication, consolidated all output directories into structured outputs/ hierarchy, and profiled 13+ leading robotics/AI researchers establishing systematic academic research tracking

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-14
item.description: The script for GPU monitoring features an adaptive UI, a HDF5 data visualization tool, as well as four sets of progress prediction experimental frameworks for the pi05 model.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-13
item.description: Built academic researcher profiling tool with LLM-powered trajectory analysis and award recognition while implementing per-frame manipulation progress tracking system for RoboTwin Place Dual Shoes task

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-12
item.description: Fixed the sandbox permissions structure in the macOS Wallpaper app, and resolved issues related to PyTorch dependencies and CUDA compilation for deep learning evaluation environments.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-11
item.description: Multi-project productivity: MIHD file restructuring + benchmarking, K8s GPU monitoring tool, VLA training optimization (torch/torchvision fix + 33% speedup via JAX/dependency alignment)

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-10
item.description: Multi-project development day spanning documentation cleanup, spatial transcriptomics debugging, robot learning optimization, and environment troubleshooting across 6+ codebases

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-09
item.description: 完成MIHD空间转录组核心功能（跨样本RM-IDEAL评估、CrossModalEnhancer跨模态增强、scGPT文献调研）、推进多个VLA/机器人项目（UniVLA文档、RoboTwin数据转换、flow matching分析）、实现gadget工具MCP服务器化与CalendarPro集成、增强research_scout多数据源支持

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-08
item.description: Extended research tool with author search and updated documentation, generated error benchmark visualizations, designed and implemented critical region annotation system for VLA training, and fixed RoboTwin rendering infrastructure

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-07
item.description: Across four devices in parallel: completed MIHD documentation system and scGPT research, launched FLARE/Phoenix training and fixed 4 BC-RNN evaluation bugs, implemented Desktop Video webpage wallpaper with WKWebView, batch-generated 20+ days of February historical reports, completed CalendarPro context-aware intent classification, and built research scout paper management system from scratch to full-featured tool with language configuration, reverse initialization, and deduplication

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-06
item.description: Cross-project work spanning spatial transcriptomics data analysis, CalendarPro bug fix and comprehensive documentation, robot learning codebase restructuring, Docker rendering stack resolution, and Phoenix/FLARE training pipeline design

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-05
item.description: Cross-device parallel development spanning MIHD spatial transcriptomics (RM-IDEAL cross-sample benchmarking revealing layer-specific performance patterns), gadget toolkit enhancements (monthly summarization + Claude Code comprehensive guide), VLA/Openpi-moe training pipeline debugging (curobo installation + normalization bug fix), and CalendarPro personal butler system comprehensive upgrade (31-goal implementation with 16 new services, followed by systematic code audit identifying critical bugs and dangerous exception handlers)

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-04
item.description: Multi-project research and documentation day: investigated QueST paper’s cross-sample query evaluation methodology for spatial transcriptomics, improved Desktop Video CLAUDE.md, created comprehensive zhaoganlong Self-Reflection Framework training guide with checkpoint inventory, and synchronized error_recovery_benchmark documentation to match actual codebase implementation including pipeline architecture redesign.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-03
item.description: Completed MIHD cross-sample RM-IDEAL benchmark implementation (design, 781-line script, bug fixes, visualization, 459-line documentation) on DCC; batch-processed 13 days of historical AI conversation logs (Feb 7-19) into structured daily reports on MacBook; built BC-RNN/Pi0.5 evaluation pipeline and discovered critical base model misconfiguration on tianhe; polished screensaver UI and created website documentation.

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-02
item.description: Fixed critical MIHD scGPT benchmark bugs discovering STAIG architectural limitation, resolved Desktop Video macOS sandbox permission system with security-scoped bookmarks, monitored large-scale Pi0.5 VLA training across GPU cluster, created comprehensive external dependencies inventory, and diagnosed GPU utilization bottleneck in evaluation pipeline

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-03-01
item.description: Cross-device intensive work: completed MIHD HD dataset integration with multi-source annotation validation, large-scale codebase refactoring (250K+ LOC cleanup), batch-generated 28+ historical daily reports with workflow optimization, fixed BC-RNN/Pi0.5 training pipelines achieving 6-GPU parallel training, and delivered Desktop Video 4.1 with playback fixes and Liquid Glass UI redesign

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-28
item.description: Advanced spatial transcriptomics pipeline with Visium HD support and comprehensive RM-IDEAL benchmarking, fixed critical scGPT model loading bug improving clustering metrics by 44%, implemented desktop wallpaper History feature while resolving multi-screen power management bugs, and established VLA evaluation pipeline revealing poor Phoenix model performance despite training on target tasks

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-27
item.description: Explored Slurm cluster infrastructure, analyzed storage usage across shared filesystem, and reviewed ML model evaluation results for error recovery benchmark

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-26
item.description: Multi-device work spanning LaTeX resume creation on MacBook, comprehensive BC-RNN image mode training system with multi-task evaluation framework, and Pi0.5 model evaluation infrastructure exploration on Tianhe

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-23
item.description: Systematically optimized MIHD fusion pipeline achieving 100-500x speedup through vectorization and GPU batching, generalized STAIG to support arbitrary vision encoders, conducted comprehensive vision refinement experiments across 11 slides, while simultaneously fixing error recovery benchmark evaluation crashes and restarting Pi0.5 Phoenix training with improved monitoring

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-22
item.description: Completed MIHD Vision Refinement two-stage fusion implementation with initial testing and comprehensive file cleanup; generated gadget documentation updates and batch historical reports; executed Error Recovery Benchmark Phase II M14 baseline evaluation with GPU scheduling optimization and Pi0.5 fine-tuning pipeline setup

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-21
item.description: Created evaluation pipeline scripts for pi0.5 and mimicgen baseline models but blocked by cluster GPU access permissions

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-20
item.description: Deep infrastructure work on two projects: spatial transcriptomics caching system and robotics error recovery data generation pipeline

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-19
item.description: Advanced two major research projects: comprehensive MIHD spatial transcriptomics documentation and vision encoder analysis revealing fundamental limitations, plus Error Recovery Benchmark Phase II infrastructure completion with strategic roadmap design

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-18
item.description: Fixed critical spatial coordinate bug in MIHD multimodal fusion benchmark and built infrastructure for robotic policy visualization and checkpoint management

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-17
item.description: 我们已经修复了MIHD视觉编码器中存在的关键坐标交换问题，需要重新运行286次实验才能完全解决这一问题。同时，我们开发了多设备日常报告工具，以便处理来自四个项目在五个不同日期的对话日志。在M5/M6错误恢复基准测试中，我们成功构建了一个包含454个场景的数据库，并通过BC-RNN训练以及VLA双服务器集成实现了性能提升。此外，我们还解决了远程开发时SSH系统的稳定性问题，并修正了ccusage定价方面的错误，从而避免了13倍的成本低估现象（累计误差约为150美元以上）。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-16
item.description: Completed comprehensive VLA integration pipeline for error recovery benchmark (v4.3-v4.5), diagnosed and analyzed MIHD clustering collapse, and designed conversation summary feature for gadget daily reports

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-15
item.description: Multi-project development day: published historical daily reports to Hugo website, monitored long-running MIHD benchmark experiments on DCC cluster, completed CalendarPro codebase refactoring with recurring tasks, enhanced gadget/summarize tool with atomic writes and multi-device sync, advanced Error Recovery Benchmark with 118 scenes and policy-based generation framework

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-14
item.description: Completed major architectural refactoring of MIHD benchmarking pipeline (two-phase extraction-evaluation architecture), fixed critical error recovery benchmark bugs (force injection mechanism, detector triggering, per-detector cooldown), enhanced CalendarPro with batch delete and Google Calendar permission fixes, and upgraded gadget/summarize tool with config system, rclone cloud sync, and multi-API backend support

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-13
item.description: 全面的多项目开发日：解决了MIHD空间转录组学数据中的相关问题，并制定了为期7阶段的改进计划；对Gadget日常报告工具进行了重构，将其设计成双阶段、支持多设备的架构，同时建立了Git仓库；实现了错误恢复基准测试工具，修复了关键的演示环境不匹配问题；开发了CalendarPro功能，能够自动安排重复任务，修复了生产环境中的一些漏洞，并实现了包含随机思考功能的P0/P1级路线图功能。

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-12
item.description: Improved MIHD documentation and designed comprehensive 7-phase enhancement plan for normalization, Q-Former fusion, and QueST-inspired features

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-10
item.description: Completed spatial transcriptomics benchmark using PCA + UNI + STAIG fusion across 11 tissue sections with 7 successful runs

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-09
item.description: Enhanced MIHD benchmark visualizations with metrics overlay and launched comprehensive RM-Ideal evaluation across DLPFC sections

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-08
item.description: Implemented and integrated RM-Ideal spatial niche matching evaluation into both QueST and MIHD frameworks, enabling ground-truth benchmark comparison of embedding quality

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-07
item.description: Daily AI conversation summary

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-06
item.description: Implemented public benchmark submission pipeline with GitHub Pages deployment and interactive user consent flow

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-05
item.description: Implemented and debugged end-to-end GCN+STAIG fusion system, discovering and fixing 6 critical issues (4 algorithmic alignments + 2 flexibility bugs), diagnosed hyperparameter mismatches causing 9x performance degradation

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-03
item.description: Fixed incomplete benchmarking documentation for MIHD by regenerating visualizations and updating experiment logs

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-02
item.description: Investigated MIHD benchmarking results and located missing documentation files

item.title: Bug Journal 2026-02-01
item.description: Debugged and fixed MIHD spatial transcriptomics model performance degradation (ARI 0.4→0.13), implemented STAIG GCN alignment, and identified environment/clustering method as critical factors

item.title: Random Ideas
item.description: The RAM in the notebook continues to consume power even after closing the screen.

item.title: 简历
item.description:
Thomas Tang

Email: zijia.tang@duke.edu | Phone: +1 (858) 340-5757 Research Areas: Artificial Intelligence, Robotics, AI4Science, Bioinformatics

Education Background

Duke University | August 2024 – Present *Major: Computer Science (Bachelor’s Degree) *GPA: 4.0 / 4.0 Courses Taken: Applied Machine Learning, Advanced Algorithms, Linear Algebra

Representative Papers

FLARE: A Failure-Aware Framework for Autonomous Correction and Recovery in VLA Co-first author| CVPR 2026 *Addresses the “fragility” problem of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models—where even minor perturbations can lead to catastrophic failures—to endow robots with human-like robustness. *Proposes a novel Retry & Reset paradigm and designs a perturbation and bridging data augmentation pipeline to systematically decouple robot pose from environmental state, addressing ID errors. *Integrates Gemini-2.5-Pro as an offline fault analyzer to uncover object-centered “reset” skills for OOD recovery; implemented using LoRA fine-tuning based on the Pi_0.5 backbone network. *Achieved 84.0% success rate across 9 contact-intensive tasks in RoboMimic, 26.2% better than previous best methods.

item.title: Benchmark
item.description: <iframe src="" style="width:100%;height:80vh;border:none;" loading="lazy"></iframe>
